Increases the collection of experience points during battle for both spouses by a maximum of 20% for 3 hours, if worn by one of them. The effect of the item depends on the percentage of love points. If a couple has, for example, 50% love points, the maximum effect is reduced by half.

Increases the attack power for both spouses by a maximum of 40 for 3 hours, if worn by one of them. The effect of the item depends on the percentage of love points. If a couple has, for example, 50% love points, the maximum effect is reduced by half.
